sys_ui_message.key:
Tasker - Cancelling updates will revert the changes made and reload the previously saved settings.

Would you like to reset to the previous values?
sys_ui_message.message:
Cancelling updates will revert the changes made and reload the previously saved settings.

Would you like to reset to the previous values?
sys_ui_message.sys_name:
Tasker - Cancelling updates will revert the changes made and reload the previously saved settings.

Would you like to reset to the previous values?
